module Ingestion
  class SummaryBuilder
    def initialize(product:)
      @product = product
    end

    def call
      reviews = @product.reviews
      rated_reviews = reviews.where.not(rating: nil)

      @product.update!(
        reviews_count: reviews.count,
        average_rating: average_rating(rated_reviews),
        rating_distribution: rating_distribution(rated_reviews),
        sentiment_distribution: reviews.group(:sentiment).count,
        oldest_review_at: reviews.minimum(:review_date),
        newest_review_at: reviews.maximum(:review_date),
        ingestion_summary: {
          reviews_imported: reviews.count,
          source_platform: @product.platform,
          source_url: @product.source_url
        }
      )
    end

    private
      def average_rating(rated_reviews)
        rated_reviews.average(:rating)&.round(2)
      end

      def rating_distribution(rated_reviews)
        rated_reviews.group(:rating).count.transform_keys(&:to_s)
      end
  end
end

module Ingestion
  class SummaryBuilder
    SENTIMENTS = %w[ positive neutral negative unknown ].freeze
    RATINGS = (1..5).freeze
    COVERAGE_FIELDS = %w[ body rating reviewer_label reviewer_role reviewer_company_size review_date ].freeze

    def initialize(product:)
      @product = product
    end

    def call
      reviews = product.reviews
      review_count = reviews.count
      rated_reviews = reviews.where.not(rating: nil)

      product.update!(
        reviews_count: review_count,
        average_rating: average_rating(rated_reviews),
        rating_distribution: rating_distribution(rated_reviews),
        sentiment_distribution: sentiment_distribution(reviews),
        oldest_review_at: reviews.minimum(:review_date),
        newest_review_at: reviews.maximum(:review_date),
        ingestion_summary: ingestion_summary(reviews, review_count, rated_reviews)
      )
    end

    private

    attr_reader :product

    def average_rating(rated_reviews)
      rated_reviews.average(:rating)&.round(2)
    end

    def rating_distribution(rated_reviews)
      counts = rated_reviews.group(:rating).count

      RATINGS.index_with { |rating| counts.fetch(rating, 0) }.transform_keys(&:to_s)
    end

    def sentiment_distribution(reviews)
      counts = reviews.group(:sentiment).count

      SENTIMENTS.index_with { |sentiment| counts.fetch(sentiment, 0) }
    end

    def ingestion_summary(reviews, review_count, rated_reviews)
      {
        platform: product.platform,
        source_url: product.source_url,
        product_name: product.name,
        reviews_imported: review_count,
        usable_review_count: review_count,
        corpus_quality: review_count >= Product::MINIMUM_USABLE_REVIEW_COUNT ? "viable" : "thin",
        average_rating: average_rating(rated_reviews),
        rating_distribution: rating_distribution(rated_reviews),
        sentiment_distribution: sentiment_distribution(reviews),
        fields_coverage: fields_coverage(reviews, review_count),
        parser_warnings: parser_warnings(review_count)
      }
    end

    def fields_coverage(reviews, review_count)
      COVERAGE_FIELDS.index_with do |field|
        next 0.0 if review_count.zero?

        present_count = reviews.where.not(field => blank_value_for(field)).count
        (present_count.to_f / review_count).round(2)
      end
    end

    def blank_value_for(field)
      field == "rating" || field == "review_date" ? nil : [ nil, "" ]
    end

    def parser_warnings(review_count)
      return [ "No usable raw user-written reviews were imported" ] if review_count.zero?
      return [ "Imported corpus is thin; grounded answers may be limited" ] if review_count < Product::MINIMUM_USABLE_REVIEW_COUNT

      []
    end
  end
end

require "test_helper"

class Ingestion::ImporterTest < ActiveSupport::TestCase
  test "imports parsed reviews for current product and derives sentiment from rating" do
    product = products(:manual)

    result = Ingestion::Importer.import(product, [
      parsed_review(external_review_id: "import-positive", rating: 5),
      parsed_review(external_review_id: "import-neutral", rating: 3, body: "It was okay."),
      parsed_review(external_review_id: "import-negative", rating: 1, body: "Billing failed.")
    ])

    assert_equal 3, result.imported
    assert_equal 0, result.skipped
    assert_equal %w[ negative neutral positive ], product.reviews.order(:sentiment).pluck(:sentiment)
  end

  test "skips duplicate external review ids and empty bodies" do
    product = products(:manual)
    duplicate = parsed_review(external_review_id: "same-review", body: "Original body")

    result = Ingestion::Importer.import(product, [
      duplicate,
      parsed_review(external_review_id: "same-review", body: "Changed body"),
      parsed_review(external_review_id: "blank-review", body: " ")
    ])

    assert_equal 1, result.imported
    assert_equal 2, result.skipped
    assert_equal [ "Original body" ], product.reviews.pluck(:body)
  end

  test "deduplicates by content hash when external review id is missing" do
    product = products(:manual)

    result = Ingestion::Importer.import(product, [
      parsed_review(external_review_id: nil, content_hash: "same-content", body: "Same body"),
      parsed_review(external_review_id: nil, content_hash: "same-content", body: "Same body")
    ])

    assert_equal 1, result.imported
    assert_equal 1, result.skipped
    assert_equal 1, product.reviews.count
  end

  test "truncates review body and marks corpus quality thin below twenty usable reviews" do
    product = products(:manual)

    Ingestion::Importer.import(product, [
      parsed_review(external_review_id: "long-review", body: "a" * 5_050)
    ])

    review = product.reviews.find_by!(external_review_id: "long-review")
    assert_equal 5_000, review.body.length
    assert_equal "thin", product.reload.ingestion_summary["corpus_quality"]
    assert_equal 1, product.ingestion_summary["usable_review_count"]
  end

        review_date: Time.zone.parse("2026-06-01T12:00:00Z"),

      }.merge(attributes)
    end
end

require "test_helper"

class Ingestion::SummaryBuilderTest < ActiveSupport::TestCase
  test "computes deterministic product summary without llm calls" do
    product = products(:example)

    Ingestion::SummaryBuilder.new(product: product).call

    product.reload

    assert_equal 4, product.reviews_count
    assert_equal 3.0, product.average_rating
    assert_equal({ "1" => 0, "2" => 1, "3" => 1, "4" => 1, "5" => 0 }, product.rating_distribution)
    assert_equal({ "positive" => 1, "neutral" => 1, "negative" => 1, "unknown" => 1 }, product.sentiment_distribution)

    summary = product.ingestion_summary
    assert_equal "trustpilot", summary["platform"]
    assert_equal 4, summary["usable_review_count"]
    assert_equal "thin", summary["corpus_quality"]
    assert_equal 1.0, summary["fields_coverage"]["body"]
    assert_equal 0.75, summary["fields_coverage"]["rating"]
    assert_equal 0.0, summary["fields_coverage"]["reviewer_role"]
    assert_equal [ "Imported corpus is thin; grounded answers may be limited" ], summary["parser_warnings"]
  end
end
